config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is exactly how abuse and unfairness can grow. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting people first, then asking them to contribute to the common good within clear limits. From my perspective, prioritizing society too strongly can easily become an excuse to silence minorities or ignore personal dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat terlalu sering alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah mayoritas menindas minoritas dan memaksa negara tetap akuntabel. Tentu ada situasi darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasan hak harus sempit, jelas, dan sementara, bukan dijadikan kebiasaan. Kalau hak individu selalu kalah, maka “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa berubah menjadi slogan kosong yang menutupi ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective in Indonesia, we already know how easy it is for “public interest” or “social harmony” to be used as a cover for silencing criticism, protecting power, or pressuring minorities to stay quiet. Society does matter, but it becomes stronger when individual rights are protected first and any limits are truly necessary, narrow, and accountable. If the majority can always override the person, then the phrase “for society” stops being a moral principle and becomes a tool for abuse.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya hak individu harus tetap jadi batas utama, bukan dikalahkan begitu saja oleh klaim kepentingan masyarakat. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat sangat jelas bagaimana alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan kekuasaan yang berlebihan, dan itu berbahaya bagi minoritas maupun orang yang tidak populer. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi justru masyarakat yang sehat dibangun dari perlindungan hak individu yang kuat, bukan dari kebiasaan mengorbankannya. Pengecualian bisa ada dalam keadaan darurat, tetapi harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan alasan umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “the common good” can be used to pressure dissenters and minorities. Society does matter, but if individual rights are not protected first, then the majority or the powerful can always claim moral cover for abuse. I also do not believe a healthy community is built by sacrificing personal dignity; it is built by setting clear limits on power and making any restriction truly necessary, narrow, and accountable. In emergencies there can be exceptions, but they should never become a habit or a blank check.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama, bukan dikalahkan oleh klaim kepentingan masyarakat. Di AS, saya melihat terlalu sering alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan kekuasaan berlebihan, dan itu justru paling berbahaya bagi minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi masyarakat yang sehat dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu terlebih dahulu, lalu membatasi hak itu hanya bila benar-benar perlu, sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Jika tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” mudah berubah menjadi slogan yang menutupi ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
